name: Love Love 2024: The Love Election
short_description: Experience the future of democracy where romance is the key to choosing America’s next leader. But beware, a shadowy manipulator is attempting to rig the election! Date your favorite candidates and see if love can truly save the nation—what could go wrong?? 🏝️💕
detailed_description:
"Are you in it for love?"

The whimsical shores of a Florida resort set the stage for romance and rivalry among presidential candidates vying for your heart! Experience an unforgettable romantic journey in a reality TV show that decides the fate of a nation through love.

You’ll spend four wild days navigating flirty banter, heartfelt moments, and heated rivalries. But beware—a shadowy manipulator is secretly working behind the scenes, trying to rig the game and tip the scales in their favor. Will true love prevail, or will the election of love be sabotaged? It’s up to you to uncover the truth and choose your perfect match!

Features

  • Three Different Endings!

  • Margaritas! 🍹

  • Romanceable Candidates 💕

  • Shirtless RFK Jr. 😏

  • Beautiful Florida Shores 🌊

  • Alligator chicks 🐊💅

Gameplay

This game is a dialogue-driven visual novel where your choices matter! You only need one hand to click through the game 😏, as it's a classic visual novel. Like all visual novels, you can use just about any mouse on the market to click the left mouse button to progress the story and continue the dialogue and narration. Be weary of your choices, as they may decide the fate of the nation!

Future Plans

This is only the beginning! Stay tuned for upcoming updates and future episodes to the Love Love saga!
